texto: 'Try Again' - every time I hear that song, it just brings a smile to your face. When you're feeling like crap, and you hear, 'Dust yourself off and try again,' it kind of just puts you in a different mindset, 100 percent.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alexandra Shipp: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “'Try Again' - every time I hear that song, it just brings a smile to your face. When you're feeli…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, time, yourself pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de yourself e mindset.
